metadata.title: AI Voice Agents and Servi-IA | ServiGlobal · IA
metadata.description: ServiGlobal · IA implements Servi-IA on top of your operation for smart scheduling, lead capture and qualification, and automated service with voice and integrations.
metadata.keywords: ServiGlobal IA, Servi-IA, voice agents, artificial intelligence, smart scheduling, lead qualification, automated service, triage, call automation
metadata.ogTitle: ServiGlobal · IA implements Servi-IA for your operation
metadata.ogDescription: Guided implementation of Servi-IA to schedule, qualify leads, and automate service with voice and integrations.
metadata.twitterDescription: Scheduling, leads, and automated service with Servi-IA.

whyUs.title: Why trust us?
whyUs.subtitle: ServiGlobal · IA combines voice experience, real integration, and support to implement Servi-IA without friction.

voiceExperience.title: Solid voice experience
voiceExperience.subtitle: Proven operations.

existingInfra.subtitle: Real integration.
existingInfra.description: We connect with your existing PBX, telephony, CRM, and calendars. No need to change what already works.

hero.descriptionFull: Servi-IA is the voice agent solution we configure and integrate for your case: voice, WhatsApp, CRM, and scheduling connected to your real operation.
hero.descriptionShort: Servi-IA is designed and integrated for your operation.
hero.microcopySetup: Initial diagnosis → Functional pilot → Continuous optimization.
hero.microcopySuperPlus: We do not hand over an empty platform; we implement Servi-IA on top of your real operation.

tasks: Response logging in CRM or internal systems

useCases.resultsTitle: Outcomes we implement inside each vertical

benefits.title: How can Servi-IA benefit you?
benefits.subtitle: Results oriented to operations, sales, and service through guided implementation.

sales.title: Increase Sales
sales.desc: We filter and qualify prospects so your team only handles leads ready to buy.

service.title: 24/7 Service
service.desc: Constant availability in messaging and voice, with handoff to human when needed.

errors.title: Reduce Errors
errors.desc: Consistent and auditable flows: fewer human errors in repetitive tasks.

costs.title: Save Operating Costs
costs.desc: Automate volume without hiring more staff for routine work.

stack.title: Integrate Your Stack
stack.desc: Connect calendars, email, messaging, telephony and internal tools.

time.title: Record Time
time.desc: Guided implementation with clear deliverables: diagnosis → pilot → production.

superPlus.title: Faster Closing with Context
superPlus.desc: The call starts with form data, reducing repeat questions and accelerating scheduling, sales, or resolution.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: Regulatory compliance (Banking, Health). Deploy on your infrastructure or private cloud for total control.

roi.title: Value appears when Servi-IA removes operational friction
roi.description: We do not promise fixed numbers without diagnosis. Return usually comes from responding faster, losing fewer opportunities, confirming more appointments, and freeing the team from repetitive work.

response.title: Response speed
response.description: Less time between lead interest and the first contextual contact.

agenda.title: Calendar / occupancy
agenda.description: More requests converted into confirmed appointments and less friction to reschedule.

workload.title: Operational workload
workload.description: Less team time spent on repetitive questions, reminders, and first-level classification.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.description: More service capacity without growing headcount at the same pace.

process.title: We don't sell a platform.
process.subtitle: We implement a system that fits your operation.
process.description: ServiGlobal · IA implements Servi-IA with full support: design, integration with your PBX, CRM, and channels, and continuous operation.

phase1.title: Pre-consultation (Diagnosis)
phase1.description: A free first step. We analyze your use case, relevant channels, volume, and scope.

phase2.title: Implementation (Pilot)
phase2.description: We build your Servi-IA, integrate channels (voice + messaging) and deliver in record time.

phase3.title: Production & Optimization
phase3.description: Deployment, metrics monitoring, and continuous optimization of conversation flows.

integrations.title: We connect with what you
integrations.description: No need to change your infrastructure. Our agents integrate natively with your existing operation.
integrations.description2: Human handoff is configurable to your operation: by call, by messaging, or no handoff at all.

pricing.title: Plans and Pricing
pricing.subtitle: You are not paying only for minutes. You are paying for a guided operation with support, platform, maintenance, and continuous improvement. The pre-consultation defines scope before kickoff.

webConversion.name: Web Conversion Plan
webConversion.idealFor: Ideal for smart digital capture and conversion
features: Click to call from web, campaigns, and social channels
Up to 30 simultaneous calls as a commercial capacity claim

voiceCloud.name: Voice Cloud / PBX Plan
voiceCloud.idealFor: Ideal for real voice operation, PSTN, PBX, and telephony integration
features: Integration with telephony, PBX, DID, or trunks
Real voice operation for inbound calls or defined flows
Connection with CRM, calendar, and operations tools
Assessment of additional costs for telephony integrations

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.idealFor: Custom solutions for high volume, multiple agents, or critical integrations
features: Deep integrations with PBX, CRM, APIs, or internal systems
Operational terms and support defined by proposal
Technical and commercial assessment in pre-consultation

operationIncludes.title: What does monthly operation include?
operationIncludes.description: The monthly fee covers service operation, not just consumption. ServiGlobal · IA supports the solution so Servi-IA keeps working on top of your real operation.

items.platform: Platform use, configuration, and base minutes
items.maintenance: Maintenance, minor adjustments, and continuous improvement

commercialTerms.title: Commercial terms
commercialTerms.description: Simple scale for additional consumption and complementary services.
items: Second agent with no setup, subject to complexity, with 10% monthly discount.
Meta / WhatsApp costs are covered by the client.
Values in USD using the current exchange rate for the day.

pricing.consumptionNote: Monthly operation covers an operated service, ongoing support, and platform use. Setup is a one-time payment for the initial implementation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions before the pre-consultation.

whatIncludes.question: What does monthly operation include vs setup?
whatIncludes.answer: Setup covers the initial design, development, and integration of Servi-IA with your systems. Monthly operation covers the operated service, ongoing support, platform, maintenance, minor adjustments, and the base package of included minutes.

additionalMinutes.question: How is additional consumption charged?
additionalMinutes.answer: If you exceed the included minutes, additional consumption follows the scale: Web Conversion starts at USD 0.16/min, Voice Cloud / PBX starts at USD 0.18/min, and Enterprise is defined by volume and complexity.

secondAgent.question: How does adding a second agent work?
secondAgent.answer: A second agent is usually added with no setup fee (subject to complexity evaluation), and you get a 10% discount on the monthly fee for the second agent.

metaCosts.question: Who covers WhatsApp / Meta costs?
metaCosts.answer: Outbound or proactive messages on WhatsApp are governed by Meta's pricing and are directly covered by the client through their own card or messaging balance.

replaceTeam.question: Does this replace my team?
replaceTeam.answer: No. It automates repetitive tasks and frees your team for higher-value work. Servi-IA escalates to a human agent when the case falls outside automated scripts.

changeOperation.question: Do I need to change my current operation?
changeOperation.answer: No. We integrate with your existing infrastructure (CRM, calendars, PBX, telephony, messaging).

voiceInfra.question: Do I need to replace my current voice infrastructure?
voiceInfra.answer: No. Servi-IA can connect to your existing phone system, PBX, or voice provider when the integration is technically available.

howLong.question: How long does implementation take?
howLong.answer: It depends on the scope evaluated during the free pre-consultation. We typically define and deploy a functional pilot in weeks.

omnichannel.question: Can Servi-IA work across WhatsApp, web, and phone calls?
omnichannel.answer: Yes. We design the flow according to your channels so the agent can receive context, answer, qualify, schedule, or escalate from the touchpoints your operation uses.

handoffRequired.question: What happens when a case needs a human agent?
handoffRequired.answer: Servi-IA detects cases outside the automated flow and transfers the context to your team so the conversation can continue without starting from zero.

ownMetrics.question: Can I track my own operation metrics?
ownMetrics.answer: Yes. We can connect the agent to your CRM, dashboards, or reporting processes so you can measure conversations, outcomes, usage, and operational follow-up.

whatIsClickToIA.question: What is Click-to-Servi-IA-Call?
whatIsClickToIA.answer: It is a web or campaign flow where a visitor leaves their details and immediately connects with Servi-IA by voice, with the form context already available to the agent.

whatIsCallback.question: What is a callback with Servi-IA?
whatIsCallback.answer: It is an outbound call requested from a form or workflow. Servi-IA calls the person with the submitted context and follows the rules defined for your operation.

dataPrivacy.question: Do you handle sensitive data and regulatory compliance?
dataPrivacy.answer: Yes, for regulated sectors we have implementation processes that guarantee data sovereignty and secure storage within your ecosystem.

booking.title: Schedule your diagnosis
booking.description: Book a diagnosis call (20-30 min). ServiGlobal · IA will evaluate where Servi-IA can create return in your operation.
booking.microcopy: We will deliver an automation plan with technical feasibility, required integrations, and implementation timing.
booking.postSchedule: Have ready: current processes, phone system / CRM you use, and current challenges.

legal.consentCheckbox: I expressly authorize the processing of my personal data in accordance with the privacy policy.
legal.consentRequired: You must authorize personal data processing to continue.

voiceDemo.title: Try Click-to-Servi-IA-Call now
voiceDemo.subtitle: Try the funnel: form → Servi-IA call with context → close.
voiceDemo.disclaimer: This demo is an example. In the consultation we design your real flow with your rules and integrations.
